docs.title: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog
docs.text:
LinkML schema for the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog. The KEV catalog is the authoritative source of vulnerabilities that have been exploited in the wild, maintained by the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA).

URI: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog

Name: kev-catalog

docs.title: Classes
docs.text: Class Description Configuration Logical grouping of CPE match expressions Impact Assessment of the vulnerability's impact and severity KevCatalog The CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog — the authoritative so... Product Software or hardware entity affected by the vulnerability Reference External reference such as an advisory or article Vulnerability Abstract base representation of a security vulnerability KevEntry A single entry in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, rep... Weakness Weakness classification from CWE or a similar taxonomy

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Slot Description catalog_version The version string of the KEV catalog release count The total number of vulnerabilities in this catalog version cpe_uri CPE 2 cve_id The CVE identifier assigned by a CVE Numbering Authority (CNA) cwe_id CWE identifier for the weakness classification (e date_added The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the vulnerability was added to the KEV catalog date_released The ISO 8601 timestamp at which this catalog version was released description Narrative description of the vulnerability due_date The date (YYYY-MM-DD) by which federal civilian executive branch (FCEB) agenc... impact Impact and severity assessment for this vulnerability known_ransomware_campaign_use Whether the vulnerability is known to have been leveraged as part of a ransom... last_modified_date Date and time the vulnerability record was last modified name Name of the entity (product, weakness, reference, etc notes Additional notes or references related to the vulnerability or its remediatio... operator Logical operator (AND/OR) used in configuration node groupings platforms Platforms or operating environments affected product The name of the affected product products Products affected by this vulnerability published_date Date and time the vulnerability was first published references External references such as advisories and articles required_action The remediation action required, e score Numeric vulnerability score (e severity Qualitative severity rating short_description A brief description of the vulnerability source Source or origin of the reference or data status Current lifecycle state of the vulnerability record title Short human-readable title or name for this entity url URL pointing to the reference resource vector CVSS vector string or equivalent scoring vector expression vendor Name of the vendor or organization responsible for the product vendor_project The name of the vendor or project responsible for the affected product version Version string of the affected product vulnerabilities The list of known exploited vulnerabilities vulnerability_name A short, descriptive name for the vulnerability weaknesses Weakness classifications (e

docs.title: Enumerations
docs.text: Enumeration Description ImpactSeverity CVSS qualitative severity rating KnownRansomwareCampaignUseEnum Whether the vulnerability is known to have been used in ransomware campaigns VulnerabilityStatus Lifecycle state of a vulnerability record

docs.title: Types
docs.text: Type Description Boolean A binary (true or false) value Curie a compact URI CveId A CVE identifier assigned by a CVE Numbering Authority (CNA) Date a date (year, month and day) in an idealized calendar DateOrDatetime Either a date or a datetime Datetime The combination of a date and time Decimal A real number with arbitrary precision that conforms to the xsd:decimal speci... Double A real number that conforms to the xsd:double specification Float A real number that conforms to the xsd:float specification Integer An integer IsoDate A calendar date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD) Jsonpath A string encoding a JSON Path Jsonpointer A string encoding a JSON Pointer Ncname Prefix part of CURIE Nodeidentifier A URI, CURIE or BNODE that represents a node in a model Objectidentifier A URI or CURIE that represents an object in the model Sparqlpath A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path String A character string Time A time object represents a (local) time of day, independent of any particular... Uri a complete URI Uriorcurie a URI or a CURIE

docs.title: Class: KevCatalog
docs.text: The CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog — the authoritative source of vulnerabilities confirmed exploited in the wild, maintained by CISA per Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 22-01.

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: KevCatalog
annotations:
  directive_id:
    tag: directive_id
    value: BOD 22-01
  directive_date:
    tag: directive_date
    value: '2021-11-03'
  legal_authority:
    tag: legal_authority
    value: 44 U.S.C. § 3553(b)(2)
  issuing_body:
    tag: issuing_body
    value: Department of Homeland Security / CISA
  contact_directives:
    tag: contact_directives
    value: CyberDirectives@cisa.dhs.gov
  contact_general:
    tag: contact_general
    value: CyberLiaison@cisa.dhs.gov
description: The CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog — the authoritative
  source of vulnerabilities confirmed exploited in the wild, maintained by CISA per
  Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 22-01.
comments:
- BOD 22-01, "Reducing the Significant Risk of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities", was
  issued under Section 3553(b)(2) of title 44, U.S. Code by the Secretary of Homeland
  Security. It is a compulsory direction to all FCEB departments and agencies.
- CISA strongly recommends all organizations — including state, local, tribal and
  territorial (SLTT) governments and private sector — prioritize remediation of KEV
  catalog entries as part of their vulnerability management plan, even though BOD
  22-01 itself only binds FCEB agencies.
- 'BOD 22-01 does not apply to: national security systems (as defined by statute),
  systems operated by the Department of Defense, or systems operated by the Intelligence
  Community.'
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
see_also:
- https://www.cisa.gov/directives
- https://www.cisa.gov/binding-operational-directive-22-01
close_mappings:
- schema:Dataset
broad_mappings:
- WIKIDATA:Q2352616
slot_usage:
  title:
    name: title
    description: The title of the KEV catalog.
attributes:
  title:
    name: title
    description: The title of the KEV catalog.
    in_subset:
    - metadata
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    exact_mappings:
    - schema:name
    close_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:vulnerability_name
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:title
    owner: KevCatalog
    domain_of:
    - KevCatalog
    - Vulnerability
    range: string
  catalog_version:
    name: catalog_version
    description: The version string of the KEV catalog release.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - catalogVersion
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevCatalog
    domain_of:
    - KevCatalog
    range: string
  date_released:
    name: date_released
    description: The ISO 8601 timestamp at which this catalog version was released.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - dateReleased
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevCatalog
    domain_of:
    - KevCatalog
    range: string
  count:
    name: count
    description: The total number of vulnerabilities in this catalog version.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevCatalog
    domain_of:
    - KevCatalog
    range: integer
  vulnerabilities:
    name: vulnerabilities
    description: The list of known exploited vulnerabilities.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevCatalog
    domain_of:
    - KevCatalog
    range: KevEntry
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
tree_root: true

docs.title: Class: KevEntry
docs.text: A single entry in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, representing one CVE that has been confirmed exploited in the wild and for which clear remediation guidance exists.

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: KevEntry
description: A single entry in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog,
  representing one CVE that has been confirmed exploited in the wild and for which
  clear remediation guidance exists.
comments:
- 'Three criteria must all be met for inclusion: (1) assigned CVE ID, (2) reliable
  evidence of active exploitation in the wild, and (3) clear remediation guidance
  (vendor update or EOL removal).'
- 'BOD 22-01 focuses on a small, high-signal subset of all vulnerabilities: as of
  2022-07-15 the catalog contained 787 KEVs from a universe of ~179,383 CVEs, and
  approximately 20 of those KEVs were the most prevalent across the entire federal
  enterprise.'
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
see_also:
- https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog
exact_mappings:
- WIKIDATA:Q631425
related_mappings:
- cve:CVERecord
- cve:AffectedProduct
- schema:SoftwareApplication
- WIKIDATA:Q166142
is_a: Vulnerability
slot_usage:
  cve_id:
    name: cve_id
    exact_mappings:
    - cve:cve_id
attributes:
  vendor_project:
    name: vendor_project
    description: The name of the vendor or project responsible for the affected product.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - vendorProject
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:Organization
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: string
    required: true
  product:
    name: product
    description: The name of the affected product.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - product
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:name
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: string
    required: true
  vulnerability_name:
    name: vulnerability_name
    description: A short, descriptive name for the vulnerability.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - vulnerabilityName
    close_mappings:
    - cve:title
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:title
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: string
    required: true
  date_added:
    name: date_added
    description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the vulnerability was added to the KEV catalog.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - dateAdded
    related_mappings:
    - cve:date_published
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:created
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: IsoDate
    required: true
  short_description:
    name: short_description
    description: A brief description of the vulnerability.
    comments:
    - 'KEV inclusion criterion #2 requires reliable evidence that the vulnerability
      has been actively exploited in the wild. Active exploitation includes attempted
      and successful exploitation; scanning, security research, and public PoC alone
      do not qualify.'
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - shortDescription
    close_mappings:
    - cve:description
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:description
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: string
    required: true
  required_action:
    name: required_action
    description: The remediation action required, e.g. "Apply updates per vendor instructions."
    comments:
    - 'BOD 22-01 specifies two acceptable actions: (1) apply updates per vendor instructions,
      or (2) remove the product from agency networks if it is end-of-life or cannot
      otherwise be updated. Temporary mitigations and workarounds may be applied while
      awaiting a vendor patch.'
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - requiredAction
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: string
    required: true
  due_date:
    name: due_date
    description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) by which federal civilian executive branch
      (FCEB) agencies must remediate the vulnerability per BOD 22-01.
    comments:
    - Deadline set by CISA. Under BOD 19-02, internet-accessible critical vulnerabilities
      (CVSS >9.0) must be remediated within 15 calendar days and high vulnerabilities
      (7.0-9.0) within 30 calendar days of initial detection; BOD 22-01 due dates
      may be tighter and apply to all agency systems, not only internet-accessible
      ones.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - dueDate
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: IsoDate
    required: true
  known_ransomware_campaign_use:
    name: known_ransomware_campaign_use
    description: Whether the vulnerability is known to have been leveraged as part
      of a ransomware campaign.
    notes:
    - CISA encourages organizations with evidence of exploited vulnerabilities not
      listed in the KEV to submit them to vulnerability@mail.cisa.dhs.gov.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - knownRansomwareCampaignUse
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: KnownRansomwareCampaignUseEnum
    required: false
  notes:
    name: notes
    description: Additional notes or references related to the vulnerability or its
      remediation.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: skos:note
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevEntry
    range: string
    required: false
  cve_id:
    name: cve_id
    description: 'The CVE identifier assigned by a CVE Numbering Authority (CNA).
      Format: CVE-YYYY-NNNNN.'
    in_subset:
    - metadata
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - cveId
    exact_mappings:
    - cve:cve_id
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:identifier
    identifier: true
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: CveId
    required: true
    recommended: true
  title:
    name: title
    description: Short human-readable title or name for this entity.
    in_subset:
    - metadata
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    exact_mappings:
    - schema:name
    close_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:vulnerability_name
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:title
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - KevCatalog
    - Vulnerability
    range: string
  description:
    name: description
    description: Narrative description of the vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    exact_mappings:
    - schema:description
    close_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:short_description
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:description
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    - Weakness
    range: string
    recommended: true
  published_date:
    name: published_date
    description: Date and time the vulnerability was first published.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    related_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:date_added
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:created
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: datetime
  last_modified_date:
    name: last_modified_date
    description: Date and time the vulnerability record was last modified.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:modified
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: datetime
  products:
    name: products
    description: Products affected by this vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Product
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  weaknesses:
    name: weaknesses
    description: Weakness classifications (e.g. CWE) associated with this vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    related_mappings:
    - cwe:Weakness
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Weakness
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  references:
    name: references
    description: External references such as advisories and articles.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Reference
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  impact:
    name: impact
    description: Impact and severity assessment for this vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Impact
  status:
    name: status
    description: Current lifecycle state of the vulnerability record.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    close_mappings:
    - nvd:NVDWorkflowStatus
    rank: 1000
    owner: KevEntry
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: VulnerabilityStatus

search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Uriorcurie

a URI or a CURIE

docs.title: Class: Vulnerability
docs.text: Abstract base representation of a security vulnerability. Extended by source-specific schemas (KEV, CVE, NVD).

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: Vulnerability
description: Abstract base representation of a security vulnerability. Extended by
  source-specific schemas (KEV, CVE, NVD).
in_subset:
- core
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
exact_mappings:
- WIKIDATA:Q631425
related_mappings:
- schema:SoftwareApplication
- cwe:Weakness
broad_mappings:
- nvd:NVDEntry
- kev_catalog:KevEntry
abstract: true
slot_usage:
  cve_id:
    name: cve_id
    recommended: true
  description:
    name: description
    recommended: true
attributes:
  cve_id:
    name: cve_id
    description: 'The CVE identifier assigned by a CVE Numbering Authority (CNA).
      Format: CVE-YYYY-NNNNN.'
    in_subset:
    - metadata
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - cveId
    exact_mappings:
    - schema:identifier
    - kev_catalog:cve_id
    - nvd:cve_id
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:identifier
    identifier: true
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: CveId
    required: true
    recommended: true
  title:
    name: title
    description: Short human-readable title or name for this entity.
    in_subset:
    - metadata
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    exact_mappings:
    - schema:name
    close_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:vulnerability_name
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:title
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - KevCatalog
    - Vulnerability
    range: string
  description:
    name: description
    description: Narrative description of the vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    exact_mappings:
    - schema:description
    close_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:short_description
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:description
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    - Weakness
    range: string
    recommended: true
  published_date:
    name: published_date
    description: Date and time the vulnerability was first published.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    related_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:date_added
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:created
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: datetime
  last_modified_date:
    name: last_modified_date
    description: Date and time the vulnerability record was last modified.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:modified
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: datetime
  products:
    name: products
    description: Products affected by this vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Product
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  weaknesses:
    name: weaknesses
    description: Weakness classifications (e.g. CWE) associated with this vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    related_mappings:
    - cwe:Weakness
    rank: 1000
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Weakness
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  references:
    name: references
    description: External references such as advisories and articles.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Reference
    multivalued: true
    inlined: true
    inlined_as_list: true
  impact:
    name: impact
    description: Impact and severity assessment for this vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    rank: 1000
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: Impact
  status:
    name: status
    description: Current lifecycle state of the vulnerability record.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    close_mappings:
    - nvd:NVDWorkflowStatus
    rank: 1000
    owner: Vulnerability
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    range: VulnerabilityStatus

docs.title: Enum: VulnerabilityStatus
docs.text: Lifecycle state of a vulnerability record.

docs.title: Class: Weakness
docs.text: Weakness classification from CWE or a similar taxonomy.

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: Weakness
description: Weakness classification from CWE or a similar taxonomy.
in_subset:
- core
from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
close_mappings:
- cwe:Weakness
- nvd:NVDWeakness
attributes:
  cwe_id:
    name: cwe_id
    description: CWE identifier for the weakness classification (e.g. CWE-79).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - cweId
    related_mappings:
    - cwe:Weakness
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:identifier
    owner: Weakness
    domain_of:
    - Weakness
    range: string
    pattern: ^CWE-[1-9][0-9]*$
  name:
    name: name
    description: Name of the entity (product, weakness, reference, etc.).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    aliases:
    - label
    - product
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: rdfs:label
    owner: Weakness
    domain_of:
    - Product
    - Reference
    - Weakness
    range: string
  description:
    name: description
    description: Narrative description of the vulnerability.
    in_subset:
    - core
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog
    exact_mappings:
    - schema:description
    close_mappings:
    - kev_catalog:short_description
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:description
    owner: Weakness
    domain_of:
    - Vulnerability
    - Weakness
    range: string

docs.title: Slot: catalog_version
docs.text: The version string of the KEV catalog release.

docs.title: Slot: count
docs.text: The total number of vulnerabilities in this catalog version.

docs.title: Slot: cpe_uri
docs.text: CPE 2.2 URI identifying an affected product configuration.

docs.title: Slot: cve_id
docs.text: The CVE identifier assigned by a CVE Numbering Authority (CNA). Format: CVE-YYYY-NNNNN.

docs.title: Slot: cwe_id
docs.text: CWE identifier for the weakness classification (e.g. CWE-79).

docs.title: Slot: date_added
docs.text: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the vulnerability was added to the KEV catalog.

docs.title: Slot: date_released
docs.text: The ISO 8601 timestamp at which this catalog version was released.

docs.title: Slot: description
docs.text: Narrative description of the vulnerability.

docs.title: Slot: due_date
docs.text: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) by which federal civilian executive branch (FCEB) agencies must remediate the vulnerability per BOD 22-01.

docs.title: Slot: impact
docs.text: Impact and severity assessment for this vulnerability.

docs.title: kev-catalog
docs.text:
LinkML schema for the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog. The KEV catalog is the authoritative source of vulnerabilities that have been exploited in the wild, maintained by the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA).

URI: https://w3id.org/lmodel/kev-catalog

docs.title: Slot: known_ransomware_campaign_use
docs.text: Whether the vulnerability is known to have been leveraged as part of a ransomware campaign.

docs.title: Slot: last_modified_date
docs.text: Date and time the vulnerability record was last modified.

docs.title: Slot: name
docs.text: Name of the entity (product, weakness, reference, etc.).

docs.title: Slot: notes
docs.text: Additional notes or references related to the vulnerability or its remediation.

docs.title: Slot: operator
docs.text: Logical operator (AND/OR) used in configuration node groupings.

docs.title: Slot: platforms
docs.text: Platforms or operating environments affected.

docs.title: Slot: product
docs.text: The name of the affected product.

docs.title: Slot: products
docs.text: Products affected by this vulnerability.

docs.title: Slot: published_date
docs.text: Date and time the vulnerability was first published.

docs.title: Slot: references
docs.text: External references such as advisories and articles.

docs.title: Slot: required_action
docs.text: The remediation action required, e.g. "Apply updates per vendor instructions."

docs.title: Slot: score
docs.text: Numeric vulnerability score (e.g. CVSS base score).

docs.title: Slot: severity
docs.text: Qualitative severity rating.

docs.title: Slot: short_description
docs.text: A brief description of the vulnerability.

docs.title: Slot: source
docs.text: Source or origin of the reference or data.

docs.title: Slot: status
docs.text: Current lifecycle state of the vulnerability record.

docs.title: Slot: title
docs.text: Short human-readable title or name for this entity.

docs.title: Slot: url
docs.text: URL pointing to the reference resource.

docs.title: Slot: vector
docs.text: CVSS vector string or equivalent scoring vector expression.

docs.title: Slot: vendor
docs.text: Name of the vendor or organization responsible for the product.

docs.title: Slot: vendor_project
docs.text: The name of the vendor or project responsible for the affected product.

docs.title: Slot: version
docs.text: Version string of the affected product.

docs.title: Slot: vulnerabilities
docs.text: The list of known exploited vulnerabilities.

docs.title: Slot: vulnerability_name
docs.text: A short, descriptive name for the vulnerability.

docs.title: Slot: weaknesses
docs.text: Weakness classifications (e.g. CWE) associated with this vulnerability.
